title: Bump submodules for CLI-driven LSP and toolchain bootstrap

source.subject: chore: bump submodules for CLI-driven LSP and toolchain bootstrap

body:
Superrepo submodule bumps wire extension and compiler repos to CLI-driven LSP bootstrap landed in v0.3.

## Provenance
- **Repository:** `beskid`
- **Commit:** [`503223d`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/beskid/commit/503223d)
- **Subject:** chore: bump submodules for CLI-driven LSP and toolchain bootstrap
- **Completed:** 2026-05-25

## Catalog scope
- **Delivery version:** v0.3 (Macros, concurrency, and stabilization)
- **Workstream:** `editor-extension`
- **Domain:** `tooling`
- **Deliverable:** `v03-editor-lsp-cli`

## Relation
Contributes to deliverable **CLI LSP launch & VS Code toolchain** (`v03-editor-lsp-cli`).
